lines: Noa pins a rubbing of the north-feed valve over the faction seals.
"Resident isolation plan sounds grand. In practice we cut the north feed, then spend half the night crawling to the old return."

choices.label: Ask who keeps the loop running
Leave Noa to the ungrand work

lines: Her nail stops beneath the black-gold line in the pipe skin. "North feed closes here. The old return opens after, and Hallowfen’s answer loses the path to our cups."
"Flow drops. Anyone promising otherwise may demonstrate by carrying the difference."

choices.label: Ask whose hands turn the valves

lines: "Ours. Outside help departs as soon as the report sounds impressive, so Horace is teaching the old valves to people who sleep here."

choices.label: Let Noa return to the rubbing
